Setlist
The 100 Longest Known Performances
Song times from known tapes as of July 31, 2025. It should always be assumed that "longest" means "longest known spread recording." Of course there are hundreds of shows - mostly in the early days that don't have tapes or song times.

By Song:
Seek Up: 38
Two Step: 23
#41: 20
Jimi Thing: 13
Bartender: 3
All Along the Watchtower, #36, and Cortez the Killer: 1

By Year:
2005: 19
2006: 15
2000: 10
2013: 8

Earliest entry: #72 - Jimi Thing - 21:07 - 3.17.1993 - Richmond, VA
Latest entry: #87 - Seek Up - 20:55 - 6.28.2024 - Noblesville, IN

Performances with special guests: 33 (including the complete top 10)
Performances with BÃ©la Fleck: 18 (including 12 of the top 13)

Openers: 4 (longest - Seek Up - 22:19 - 9.11.03)
Closers: 13 (longest - #41 - 32:03 - longest song in DMB history - 4.20.02)
Encores: 10 (longest - #41 - 27:28 - 11.21.98)
